title: Gamers just obtained TOTAL VICTORY
description:
AAA corporations have spent years engaging in increasingly predatory strategies, and it's not surprising that gamers are rejecting the industry more and more. Now, a new website has launched tracking the latest flops, and online couch activists are going full aggro rage mode which is truly hilarious to witness.
